summary: A website aggregating t-shirt brands with links and pricing information
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Hero banner image featuring trendy t-shirt designs in a collage style with modern aesthetic (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Placeholder brand logo image for brands without logos, minimalist design (placeholder-brand.dim_200x200.png)

existing_features.title: Create a frontend page displaying all t-shirt brands in a grid or list layout
Display brand name, clickable link to brand website, and price range for each t-shirt brand
Implement a form to add new t-shirt brands with fields for brand name, website URL, and price range
Apply a creative, modern visual theme with consistent colors, typography, and layout throughout the website that reflects a retail/fashion aesthetic

new_feature_requests.summary: Display multiple t-shirt brands on the website
Show links to each t-shirt brand
Display pricing information for t-shirts from each brand
Create a backend data model to store t-shirt brand information including brand name, website URL, and price range
Implement backend methods to add, retrieve, and list all t-shirt brands
